body:
## Dealix Intelligence-to-Revenue-to-Delivery OS
### نظام الاستخبارات → الإيراد → التسليم

The company-wide daily machine — **not** just a targeting script. It connects the
full path from the first look at a company to renewal:

```
Market research → company intelligence → compliance gate → scoring →
weakness mapping → offer routing → drafts (founder-approval) → diagnostic →
payment → delivery handoff → proof pack → upsell → learning loop ⟲
```

Every company exits with one of three verdicts: **Target now / Nurture later /
Reject (with reason)**. Every company that pays exits with **Delivery Pack +
Proof Pack + Upsell Decision**.

---

### What's in this PR

**Scripts** (`scripts/targeting_*.py`) — offline, deterministic, stdlib + PyYAML.
No network, no LLM, no scraping, so every output is reviewable and reproducible:

| Stage | Script |
|-------|--------|
| Query factory (manual run) | `targeting_query_factory.py` |
| Discovery (seed consolidation) | `targeting_discovery.py` |
| Normalize / dedupe | `targeting_normalizer.py` |
| Compliance gate | `targeting_compliance_gate.py` |
| Scoring (0–100, auditable) | `targeting_scorecard.py` |
| Weakness mapping | `targeting_weakness_mapper.py` |
| Offer routing | `targeting_offer_router.py` |
| Draft Lab (no auto-send) | `targeting_draft_lab.py` |
| Daily founder brief (orchestrator) | `targeting_daily_brief.py` |
| Delivery handoff (paid → customer folder) | `targeting_delivery_handoff.py` |
| Learning loop (weekly retro) | `targeting_learning_loop.py` |
| Shared helpers | `targeting_common.py` |

**Config + sample data** — `data/targeting/`: `scoring_weights.yml`, `sectors.yml`,
`cities.yml`, `signals.yml`, `blocked_sources.yml`, `company_master.jsonl`,
`company_seed_template.csv`, `outcomes.jsonl`. Generated `out/` artifacts are
gitignored; `customers/` delivery folders are gitignored (data-retention policy).

**Docs** — `docs/01_go_to_market/` (Market Intelligence OS, Daily 400 loop,
Scorecard, Weakness Mapping, Offer Routing, Draft Lab, Shortlist rules, Delivery
handoff, Weekly retro), `docs/03_governance/` (research source, outreach approval,
no-spam, robots & terms, prospect retention, external actions), `docs/04_delivery/`
(Command Sprint delivery OS, customer folder template, proof pack template,
acceptance criteria).

**Tests** — `tests/test_targeting_{scorecard,compliance_gate,delivery_handoff,pipeline}.py`
(28 passing).

---

### Non-negotiables enforced in code + tests

- ❌ No messages sent automatically — Draft Lab stamps `AUTO_SEND: false`; `validate_draft` blocks it.
- ❌ No scraping behind login; robots.txt + source terms respected (compliance gate).
- ❌ No personal phone numbers / leaked data → hard reject with a reason.
- ✅ Every target carries evidence (`minimum_evidence_count`).
- ✅ Every draft requires founder approval.
- ✅ Every paid target creates a delivery handoff (11-file customer folder).
- ✅ Every delivery produces a proof pack (L1→L5).
- ✅ Sensitive sectors held for governance review, never auto-targeted.

---

### Run it

```bash
# Daily brief (compliance → score → weakness → offer → drafts)
python scripts/targeting_daily_brief.py --in data/targeting/company_master.jsonl --out data/targeting/out
# After a company pays:
python scripts/targeting_delivery_handoff.py --company "Company Name"
# Weekly:
python scripts/targeting_learning_loop.py --out data/targeting/out
```

### Verify

```bash
python -m pytest tests/test_targeting_scorecard.py \
  tests/test_targeting_compliance_gate.py \
  tests/test_targeting_delivery_handoff.py \
  tests/test_targeting_pipeline.py -q
```

> Note: the canonical orchestrator is `targeting_daily_brief.py` (the spec's
> `research_targeting_os.py` is realized as this end-to-end daily brief).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DRAJYq3dHqAhkCgzAk5uqA

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01DRAJYq3dHqAhkCgzAk5uqA)_

commits.messageBody:
Build the company-wide targeting machine that connects market research →
company intelligence → compliance gate → scoring → weakness mapping → offer
routing → drafts (founder-approval gated) → diagnostic → payment → delivery
handoff → proof pack → learning loop.

Scripts (offline, deterministic, stdlib + PyYAML — no network/LLM/scraping):
- targeting_common, query_factory, discovery, normalizer
- targeting_compliance_gate, targeting_scorecard, targeting_weakness_mapper
- targeting_offer_router, targeting_draft_lab, targeting_daily_brief
- targeting_delivery_handoff, targeting_learning_loop

Config + sample data under data/targeting/ (out/ artifacts gitignored).
Docs under docs/01_go_to_market, docs/03_governance, docs/04_delivery.
Tests: scorecard, compliance_gate, delivery_handoff, pipeline (28 passing).

Non-negotiables enforced in code + tests: no auto-send, no scraping behind
login, robots/terms respected, no personal phone numbers, every target has
evidence, every draft requires founder approval, every paid target creates a
delivery handoff, every delivery produces a proof pack.

commits.messageHeadline: style: apply black formatting to targeting OS files

commits.messageBody:
- Remove unused imports flagged by CodeQL (ensure_out_dir in scorecard/
  compliance_gate/draft_lab; load_sectors/load_signals in offer_router).
- Make implicit string concatenation explicit in targeting_query_factory.
- repository-hardening.yml: bump trivy-action 0.24.0 (yanked tag) to v0.36.0;
  gate gitleaks-action on GITLEAKS_LICENSE secret presence so the org-licensed
  scan skips with a warning instead of hard-failing when the license is absent.
commits.messageHeadline: fix: address CodeQL findings + repair shared security CI

title: company: Intelligence-to-Revenue-to-Delivery OS
